head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland to Taranaki, including Coromandel, Bay of Plenty, and the central high country
Mostly cloudy. Isolated showers, becoming widespread about Bay of Plenty tomorrow.
Whanganui to Wellington
Partly cloudy tonight. Cloud increasing tomorrow, with late rain for Wellington.
Gisborne, Hawke's Bay and Wairarapa
Mainly fine tonight. High cloud increasing tomorrow with late rain for South Wairarapa.
Nelson, Marlborough
Isolated showers, turning to rain with heavy falls tomorrow afternoon.
Buller, Grey
A few showers, turning to rain with heavy falls tomorrow morning.
Canterbury, Otago and Southland
Scattered rain south of Ashburton tonight. Scattered rain spreading throughout tomorrow morning, then clearing tomorrow night.
Westland, Fiordland
Rain with heavy falls spreading north tonight, and thunderstorms possible tomorrow morning and afternoon. Rain easing tomorrow evening.
Chatham Islands
Mostly cloudy tonight. Becoming fine tomorrow.
Friday

North Island: Scattered showers, turning to rain in the west late evening.
South Island: Rain developing everywhere, becoming heavy in the north and west.
Saturday

North Island: A few showers in the east and south. Showers elsewhere, mainly in the morning and again from evening. Gale northwesterlies in the south, easing.
South Island: Rain in the west and south, easing to few showers in the morning. Mainly fine in the east. Gale northwesterlies easing in the morning, but westerlies strengthening about the south coast late.
Sunday

North Island: Fine spells and isolated showers in the west and north. A few showers developing in the south later.
South Island: Showers in the west and south with snow lowering to 400 metres in the south. Showers developing in the east.
Chatham Islands
A few showers, mainly on Saturday. Strong northerlies.
Issued: 6:25pm Wednesday 6 May 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
